fw_fuses_cluster0_atom_itd_cutoff_v.label: ITD Cluster0 Atom Itd Cutoff V
fw_fuses_cluster0_atom_itd_cutoff_v.description: The voltage from which and below, ITD effect is relevant. The fuse is in U9.1.8 volts

fw_fuses_cluster0_atom_itd_floor_v.description: ITD correction for voltages below FLOOR_V will be the same as for FLOOR_V. See RPL HSD 1309935722

fw_fuses_cluster0_atom_itd_slope.label: ITD Cluster0 Atom Itd Slope
fw_fuses_cluster0_atom_itd_slope.description:
This parameter is used to adjust the slope for correcting the voltage ITD controlled domain at low temperatures
            The final 1/'C slope correction is proportional to the deltaV from the CUTOFF_V and deltaT from the CUTOFF_TJ.

fw_fuses_cluster0_ccp_0_ia_p0_ratio_down.label: Downbin Cluster0 Ccp 0 Ia P0 Ratio Downbin
fw_fuses_cluster0_ccp_0_ia_p0_ratio_down.description:
Determines max ratio for this core by subtracting this value from IA_P0_RATIO.
                This is part of Favored Core Turbo (FCT) feature.
                As this is Turbo feature, the result P0 (IA_P0_RATIO - this fuse) must still be at least

fw_fuses_ia_p0_ratio_1_atom_delta.label: Atom Delta Ia P0 Ratio 1 Atom Delta
fw_fuses_ia_p0_ratio_1_atom_delta.description: lower Atom Core frequency of the 1st ATOM_CORENUM group. core frequency=P(0) frequency - 1_atom_delta

fw_fuses_ia_p0_ratio_2_atom_delta.label: Atom Delta Ia P0 Ratio 2 Atom Delta
fw_fuses_ia_p0_ratio_2_atom_delta.description: lower Atom Core frequency of the 2nd ATOM_CORENUM group. core frequency=P(0) frequency - 1_atom_delta - 2_atom_delta

fw_fuses_ia_p0_ratio_3_atom_delta.label: Atom Delta Ia P0 Ratio 3 Atom Delta
fw_fuses_ia_p0_ratio_3_atom_delta.description: lower Atom Core frequency of the 3rd ATOM_CORENUM group. core frequency=P(0) frequency - 1_atom_delta - ... - 3_atom_delta

fw_fuses_ia_p0_ratio_4_atom_delta.label: Atom Delta Ia P0 Ratio 4 Atom Delta
fw_fuses_ia_p0_ratio_4_atom_delta.description: lower Atom Core frequency of the 4th ATOM_CORENUM group. core frequency=P(0) frequency - 1_atom_delta - ... - 4_atom_delta

fw_fuses_ia_p0_ratio_5_atom_delta.label: Atom Delta Ia P0 Ratio 5 Atom Delta
fw_fuses_ia_p0_ratio_5_atom_delta.description: lower Atom Core frequency of the 5th ATOM_CORENUM group. core frequency=P(0) frequency - 1_atom_delta - ... - 5_atom_delta

fw_fuses_ia_p0_ratio_6_atom_delta.label: Atom Delta Ia P0 Ratio 6 Atom Delta
fw_fuses_ia_p0_ratio_6_atom_delta.description: lower Atom Core frequency of the 6th ATOM_CORENUM group. core frequency=P(0) frequency - 1_atom_delta - ... - 6_atom_delta

fw_fuses_ia_p0_ratio_7_atom_delta.label: Atom Delta Ia P0 Ratio 7 Atom Delta
fw_fuses_ia_p0_ratio_7_atom_delta.description: lower Atom Core frequency of the 7th ATOM_CORENUM group. core frequency=P(0) frequency - 1_atom_delta - ... - 7_atom_delta

fw_fuses_ia_p0_ratio_8_atom_delta.label: Atom Delta Ia P0 Ratio 8 Atom Delta
fw_fuses_ia_p0_ratio_8_atom_delta.description: lower Atom Core frequency of the 8th ATOM_CORENUM group. core frequency=P(0) frequency - 1_atom_delta - ... - 8_atom_delta

fw_fuses_ia_p0_ratio_2_bigcore_delta.label: MCT Ia P0 Ratio 2 Bigcore Delta
fw_fuses_ia_p0_ratio_2_bigcore_delta.description: lower Big IA frequency due to 2 active Big IA cores. core frequency=P(0) frequency - 2_bigcore_delta

fw_fuses_ia_p0_ratio_3_bigcore_delta.label: MCT Ia P0 Ratio 3 Bigcore Delta
fw_fuses_ia_p0_ratio_3_bigcore_delta.description: lower Big IA frequency due to 3 active Big IA cores. core frequency=P(0) frequency - 2_bigcore_delta - 3_bigcore_delta

fw_fuses_ia_p0_ratio_4_bigcore_delta.label: MCT Ia P0 Ratio 4 Bigcore Delta
fw_fuses_ia_p0_ratio_4_bigcore_delta.description: lower Big IA frequency due to 4 active Big IA cores. core frequency=P(0) frequency - 2_bigcore_delta - ... - 4_bigcore_delta

fw_fuses_ia_p0_ratio_5_bigcore_delta.label: MCT Ia P0 Ratio 5 Bigcore Delta
fw_fuses_ia_p0_ratio_5_bigcore_delta.description: lower Big IA frequency due to 5 active Big IA cores. core frequency=P(0) frequency - 2_bigcore_delta - ...- 5_bigcore_delta

fw_fuses_ia_p0_ratio_6_bigcore_delta.label: MCT Ia P0 Ratio 6 Bigcore Delta
fw_fuses_ia_p0_ratio_6_bigcore_delta.description: lower Big IA frequency due to 6 active Big IA cores. core frequency=P(0) frequency - 2_bigcore_delta - ...- 6_bigcore_delta

fw_fuses_ia_p0_ratio_7_bigcore_delta.label: MCT Ia P0 Ratio 7 Bigcore Delta
fw_fuses_ia_p0_ratio_7_bigcore_delta.description: lower Big IA frequency due to 7 active Big IA cores. core frequency=P(0) frequency - 2_bigcore_delta - ...- 7_bigcore_delta

fw_fuses_ia_p0_ratio_8_bigcore_delta.label: MCT Ia P0 Ratio 8 Bigcore Delta

fw_fuses_ia_p0_ratio_avx256_delta.label: P0 Ia P0 Ratio Avx256 Delta
fw_fuses_ia_p0_ratio_avx256_delta.description:
Amount to lower P0 when running AVX256 instructions.
                         That is, any core that runs AVX-256 will not run faster than: IA_P0_RATIO - IA_P0_RATIO_AVX256_DELTA.
                         Setting this fuse will force the lower freque

core_fuse_core_fuse_acode_core_ia_p0_rat.label: P0 Core Ia P0 Ratio
core_fuse_core_fuse_acode_core_ia_p0_rat.description:
Max turbo point in 100 MHz- MAX_TURBO_RATIO (P0)
              Units are: Uint

core_fuse_core_fuse_acode_core_ia_p0_rat.label: P0 Core Ia P0 Ratio Avx256
core_fuse_core_fuse_acode_core_ia_p0_rat.description:
P0 when running AVX256 instructions. This is an absolute ration, not delta.
              That is, any core that runs AVX-256 will not run faster.
              Setting this fuse will force the frequency even if there is no IccMax or power limitation

core_fuse_core_fuse_acode_core_ia_p0_rat.label: P0 Core Ia P0 Ratio Avx512
core_fuse_core_fuse_acode_core_ia_p0_rat.description:
P0 when running AVX512 instructions. This is an absolute ration, not delta.
              That is, any core that runs AVX-512 will not run faster.
              Setting this fuse will force the frequency even if there is no IccMax or power limitation

core_fuse_core_fuse_acode_core_ia_p0_rat.label: P0 Core Ia P0 Ratio Tmul
core_fuse_core_fuse_acode_core_ia_p0_rat.description:
P0 when running TMUL instructions. This is an absolute ration, not delta.
              That is, any core that runs TMUL will not run faster.
              Setting this fuse will force the frequency even if there is no IccMax or power limitations, so

core_fuse_core_fuse_acode_ia_itd_cutoff_.description: The voltage from which and below, ITD effect is relevant.

core_fuse_core_fuse_acode_ia_itd_cutoff_.label: ITD Ia Itd Cutoff V2
core_fuse_core_fuse_acode_ia_itd_cutoff_.description: Second voltage cutoff for new ITD algorithm (new from CFL/ICL). characterizing in U3.13 format

core_fuse_core_fuse_acode_ia_itd_slope.label: ITD Ia Itd Slope
core_fuse_core_fuse_acode_ia_itd_slope.description:
This parameter is used to adjust the slope for correcting the voltage ITD controlled domain at low temperatures
              The final 1/'C slope correction is proportional to the deltaV from the CUTOFF_V and deltaT from the CUTOFF_TJ.

core_fuse_core_fuse_acode_ia_itd_slope2.label: ITD Ia Itd Slope2
core_fuse_core_fuse_acode_ia_itd_slope2.description: Second slope for new ITD algorithm (new from CFL/ICL)

core_fuse_core_fuse_acode_ia_min_ratio.label: Ia Min Ratio
core_fuse_core_fuse_acode_ia_min_ratio.description:
Minimum ratio for IA domain in 100Mhz. Normal values are 4, 5, 6, 7, or 8. 6bits as used for enforce fixed freq by DFx flows
              Units are: Uint
